[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/24 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kayoko (New Year), 3★ Haruka (New Year)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 6/24 (Tue) After Maintenance – 7/1 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
